parse.title: Template:Quicksilver info
parse.wikitext:
<includeonly>
* {{sbc|Quicksilver}} is an [[auto-targeted]] effect.
* {{sbc|Quicksilver's}} cast does not break {{tip|stealth}}.
* {{sbc|Quicksilver}} has no [[cast time]].
* {{sbc|Quicksilver's}} {{sti|cooldown}} does not transfer between items that have its active effect.
* {{sbc|Quicksilver}} is disabled during {{tip|Airborne}} effects.
* {{tip|Suspension}} will be fully removed by {{sbc|Quicksilver}}.
* {{sbc|Quicksilver}} has a very similar effect to {{si|Cleanse}}, but there are some differences:
** {{sbc|Quicksilver}} removes {{tip|suppression}} and {{tip|nearsight}} while ''Cleanse'' does not.
** ''Cleanse'' removes {{ccib|Summoner spell icon.png|summoner spell}} [[debuff]]s while {{sbc|Quicksilver}} does not.
** ''Cleanse'' grants a {{tip|Tenacity}} buff while {{sbc|Quicksilver}} does not.
* {{sbc|Quicksilver}} does not remove any accompanying, persistent effects that occur with {{tip|crowd control}} from an enemy [[champion ability|ability]] unless otherwise stated. Some examples include the {{tip|tether}} from {{cai|Nether Grasp|Malzahar}}, the {{tip|on-hit}} attacks from {{cai|Infinite Duress|Warwick}}, and the [[damage modifier|damage reduction]] from {{si|Exhaust}}.
* {{sbc|Quicksilver}} cannot remove {{tip|stasis}}.
** Despite the fact that it cannot be ''cleansed'', {{sbc|Quicksilver}} is put on a 3-second static {{sti|cooldown|link=true}} while affected by {{cai|Tempered Fate|Bard}} and put on a {{fd|0.5-second}} cooldown for {{ii|Zhonya's Hourglass}}.
* {{sbc|Quicksilver}} will not remove self {{tip|slow|slows}}. The only exceptions are {{cai|Overdrive|Blitzcrank}} and {{cai|Behind Enemy Lines|Quinn}}.
</includeonly><noinclude>{{doc}}</noinclude>
